title: Upstart Holdings Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: 16 analysts covering Upstart Holdings stock provide a consensus rating of Buy with an average price target of $45.84, forecasting a 32.60% increase in stock price over the next year. The analyst breakdown shows 8 Buy ratings, 6 Hold ratings, and 1 Sell rating. Alternative analyst ratings show 31% recommend Strong Buy, 23% recommend Buy, 38% suggest Hold, 8% advise Sell, and 0% predict Strong Sell. Analyst price targets vary with 15 analysts projecting an average 12-month price target of $40.20, with a high estimate of $80 and low estimate of $20. UPST's current price target is $45.79. Based on 22 Wall Street analysts, UPST has bullish consensus with median price target of $45.00, ranging from $20.00 to $80.00. Piper Sandler reported the latest price target of $46.00 on May 6, 2026. In the coming quarters, analysts will monitor progress in improving margins for auto and home loan products, the pace at which operating expenses moderate and profitability improves, and milestones in the regulatory review process for Upstart's national bank charter application.
